summary: Completed comprehensive testing of reipila iteration 2 features: map routing bug fix, investor metrics, robust comparables, severity explanations, and neighborhood news RSS. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified and working. Real data confirmed: 180 parcelles (down from 185 after filtering off-69 refs), 63 high-conviction signals, 62 opportunities with investor metrics, 14 news items per commune.

design_issues.issue: Sheet overlay can block clicks on background elements when open
design_issues.impact: Minor UX issue - user must close sheet before clicking other elements
design_issues.details: When Intelligence Sheet is open on Opportunities page, its overlay intercepts pointer events from background opportunity cards. User can close sheet with X button or Escape key. This is standard modal/sheet behavior.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login (demo@reipila.com / demo1234)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me
Backend: GET /api/stats/overview (63 new signals, 7 high conviction, 27 convergence events, 180 total parcelles)
Backend: GET /api/feed (10 items)

Backend: GET /api/map/parcelles (63 GeoJSON features) - CRITICAL: All parcels have ref starting with '69' AND coordinates within Lyon bbox (lon 4.55-5.25, lat 45.55-45.95). No Paris/Nice parcels found.
Backend: GET /api/parcelles/{ref} - Robust comparables verified: comparables_stats with n_total=32, n_retenus=29, n_aberrants=3, prix_m2_median=3267, decote=-12.7%. IQR filtering working.
Backend: GET /api/signals (20 signals)

Backend: GET /api/opportunities (20 opportunities) - Investor metrics verified: All fields present (cout_travaux_estime, valeur_apres_travaux, plus_value_potentielle, marge_pct, travaux_eur_m2, dpe_classe). 17/20 opportunities have plus_value_potentielle.
Backend: GET /api/pipeline (CRUD operations: GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE)
Backend: GET /api/market (2 communes, conviction levels, 12 signal types)
Backend: GET /api/search (10 results for 'Lyon')
Backend: GET /api/communes (67 communes)
Backend: GET /api/ingest/status (180 parcelles, 2 communes ingested)
Backend: GET /api/ingest/runs (4 runs)
Backend: GET /api/news?commune=Lyon 7e - NEW endpoint verified: Returns 14 news items with all required fields (title, link, source, published, summary). Google News RSS integration working.
Backend: POST /api/ai/interpret (Claude 4.5 returned 1464 chars French interpretation with investor economics)
Frontend: Login flow with demo credentials
Frontend: Home page 3-column workspace (feed, map, intelligence drawer)
Frontend: Opportunities page (62 opportunity cards)
Frontend: Opportunities page - VERIFIED: 55/62 cards show 'Plus-value potentielle' block with investor metrics (7 are terrains without surface data)
Frontend: Intelligence Sheet opens on opportunity card click

Frontend: Intelligence Sheet Overview tab - VERIFIED: Severity explanation present with concrete utility text (e.g., 'HIGH CONVICTION — Plusieurs signaux forts pointent vers une mise en vente probable à court terme. Utilité : prioriser la prise de contact propriétaire avant la mise sur le marché.')

Frontend: Intelligence Sheet Analyse tab - VERIFIED: Investor analysis block present with 'ÉCONOMIE DE L'OPÉRATION' section showing décote, valeur estimée, travaux estimés, valeur après travaux, plus-value potentielle, marge %
Frontend: Intelligence Sheet Comparables tab - Robust pre-estimation card present for parcels with surface data (terrains show '—' as expected)
Frontend: Intelligence Sheet Quartier tab - VERIFIED: 14 news items displayed from Google News RSS feed
Frontend: Market page - VERIFIED: 'Actualité immobilière · Métropole de Lyon' section present with 14 news items from various sources (MoneyVox, PAP, Lyon Pôle Immo, Lyon Capitale, etc.)
Frontend: Market page conviction distribution bars (Critical: 2, High: 5, Medium: 20, Low: 36, Watch: 117)
Frontend: Market page signal breakdown chart
Frontend: Market page communes table (Lyon 7e: 89 parcelles/89 signaux, Lyon 6e: 87 parcelles/87 signaux)
Frontend: Signals page navigation
Frontend: Pipeline page navigation
Frontend: Settings page navigation
Frontend: Settings page ingestion status (180 parcelles after bug fix)
Frontend: Home page map canvas visible
